title: multiple LIMIT clauses maybe get wrong result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE R(id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO R(id, title) VALUES(3, NULL);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM R LIMIT 2) AS subquery LIMIT 5;
key_bug_features: Multiple LIMIT clauses in SQL query produce incorrect results
